expectations.text: Output file is a .md file in the outputs directory

expectations.evidence: ## Timeline present as a table with T+offset format

expectations.text: Document contains a ## Root Cause section
Document contains an ## Impact section (or equivalent coverage of impact)
expectations.evidence: No ## Impact section. 'User Impact: None' appears in frontmatter only. No structured impact breakdown.

expectations.text: Document contains a ## Resolution section with the specific SQL commands used
expectations.evidence: ## Resolution present with specific SQL commands

expectations.text: Document contains an ## Action Items section with at least one checklist item
expectations.evidence: ## Action Items uses table format with # / Action / Priority columns, not - [ ] checkbox format from the skill template

expectations.text: Document contains a ## Lessons Learned section
expectations.evidence: No ## Lessons Learned section. Has ## What Went Well and ## Notes instead. The lessons-learned content is embedded in Contributing Factors.

expectations.text: Severity field uses the defined scale (Critical, High, Medium, or Low) and is Medium or Low (staging only, no users affected)
expectations.evidence: No Severity field at all in the frontmatter. Has 'User Impact: None' and 'Environment: Staging' but no severity classification.
No Status field in the frontmatter.

expectations.text: Root cause explains why the migration failed — the null assumption and why it wasn't caught
expectations.evidence: Root cause explains the null assumption and PostgreSQL enforcement; Contributing Factors adds pre-migration audit gap
